chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Civil Transfer Application No.S-17 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objection 2.For hearing of main case 3.For hearing of CMA 1548/23 08-12-2023 Mr. Sheeraz Fazal, Advocate for applicant. ***** This transfer application has been filed on the ground that the parties have compromised with each other and when they tried to file compromise application, the trial Court refused to accept it. However, no record has been produced before the Court including draft compromise application to show that in fact such application was attempted to be filed. Even otherwise, this is no ground for transfer of the case, as if the Family Judge is not accepting the compromise application, then learned District Judge can be approached for this purpose. Filing of transfer application is not a proper remedy in these circumstances. Accordingly, Civil Transfer Application is dismissed. JUDGE Ahmad
